content:
Chamber of Manasi Bhushan opposed a bail application while representing victim in a rape matter. The accused subsequently withdrew the said application. 

Interestingly, the judge during oral arguments considered that the accused was at flight risk as we argued that the accused wasn’t arrested due to his absence in Delhi for about 15 days even after arresting him. The court also considered gravity of offence. After some arguments, the counsel for the accused then withdrew the bail application. 

We were led by Dr. Alok Lakhanpal Sir and it was a wonderful experience working with his team comprising of Ms. Aanchal Budhiraja. Thank you Yattinn A Arrora for having us as counsels in this matter. 

Appreciate the efforts of Ms. Sanjana Patel, Senior Associate and our interns, Ms. Vani Gupta and Mr. Ishaan Jain at Chamber of Manasi Bhushan in assisting in this matter.
